message:
chore: rustfmt cleanup across pthread, wchar, string, and test files

Pure formatting changes with zero behavioral impact: type alias line
wrapping in pthread_abi, import reordering and expression collapsing
in wchar_abi, long-line splits in wchar_abi_test, and if/else
collapsing in stpncpy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
